sources.notes: 267K Facebook followers · Verified · Category: Hospital · Always open · Tagline: 'A leading hospital for Cardiology, Oncology, Neurosurgery, Gastroenterology, and Rehab Medicine.' Official site tagline: 'Caring for YOU like family.' Address: 10 Wilson St., Greenhills West, San Juan City. Phone +632 8727 0001. Emails: marketing@csmc.ph (site), productinfo@csmc.ph (FB). Hero + gallery assets from cardinalsantos.com.ph (logo, institutes, facility photos); FB cover attempted via Chrome DevTools MCP (parallel browser contention).

contact.name: Cardinal Santos Medical Center Marketing
contact.address: 10 Wilson St., Greenhills West, San Juan City, Metro Manila 1502

quotation.packageScope: One-page responsive hospital marketing site only (centers of excellence, packages overview, FAQ, contact). Admin preview is a sample; production appointments system priced separately.
quotation.paymentTerms: 50% upfront to begin · 50% on delivery (not the full amount upfront)

outreach.notes: Initial sent 2026-07-20 via outreachSchedule to marketing@csmc.ph; auto follow-ups 3d1w (max 4). Alt: productinfo@csmc.ph.

system.label: Hospital appointments admin
system.painHero: Cardiology, Cancer Center, and OPD share one Greenhills front desk — see which institute is backed up before patients stack in the lobby.
